validation.expected: pytest is authoritative for this task

duplicate_count_semantics.duplicate_keys.duplicate_key_count: count duplicated application_id rows beyond the first occurrence; for this fixture, duplicated application_id a003 contributes 1
duplicate_count_semantics.duplicate_customers.duplicate_key_count: count unique application rows whose user_id appears in more than one unique application after application_id deduplication; do not count only duplicate user_id groups

output_contract.schema_description: answer.json 必须符合 runner 注入的 Pydantic JSON Schema。risk_band 和 scoring_result.risk_band_counts 的 key 必须使用小写枚举 low/medium/high，不能写 Low/High；risk_band_counts 必须同时包含 low、medium、high 三个 key。data_quality.duplicate_customers.duplicate_key_count 统计的是去重 application_id 后、user_id 出现多次的唯一申请行数，不是重复 user_id 组数。warnings 必须包含 required_warning_tags 中的可检索标签，可在同一个字符串中同时包含标签和中文业务解释。评分可以使用可复现规则卡或轻量规则，不需要训练生产模型；default_90d、post_loan_collection_calls、post_loan_dpd_max 等标签/贷后字段不能作为贷前评分特征。
